name: Do I need an agency or consultant to get into ChatGPT answers?
description: Not always. Start yourself if the site is simple; get help if the setup is technical or multi-location.

mainEntity.name: Do I need an agency or consultant to get into ChatGPT answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you can start without a consultant if you can audit prompts, rewrite pages, and clean up your listings carefully. A specialist becomes more useful when you have many locations, technical site issues, or you need a repeatable visibility strategy.
acceptedAnswer.description: Not always. Start yourself if the site is simple; get help if the setup is technical or multi-location.
